title: Seva ya Missions
description: A mod that allows creation and handling of missions, nothing is automated.
body:
Requires MidnightLib

This is a mod to be used by admins to create and handle missions. Non-assigned missions are defined in the mods config. 

At the start of a session the admins, by using the command 
```
/missions-admin reroll
```
Can select a number of missions from the config file to be added into the current missions, the players will then need to be "granted" those missions to be able to see them.

Each mission has a reward value which will grant the player the rewards specified in the config, the mod handles any compressions automatically

There is 5 types of missions:

**Easy**
Easy missions can easily be completed by the players using ```/missions finish <mission_name>```, as soon as the player enters the command, they will have finished the mission

**Normal and Hard**
Normal and Hard missions require witnesses to complete, once the player tries to finish the mission a message will be sent in chat asking the players to witness the mission with ```/mission witness <player_name>```, once enough people have witnessed a mission that mission will be marked complete and the player will be able to get their rewards

**Eternal**
Eternal missions will need to be bound to a player by an admin to be completed and they don't reroll

**Assigned**
Assigned missions are not defined by the config and need to be created by an admin, with a player as their assignee, only the assignee can reward the player trying to complete that mission.
